center.name: West Gippsland
center.summary: West Gippsland is a region of Gippsland in Victoria, Australia.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: howei is found in West Gippsland and the Strzelecki Ranges of southern Victoria. Its preferred habitat is rainforest in the tropics and wet sclerophyll forest in temperate areas. It is sedentary and more common in the north of its range
